'''Linis''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Zaric sector/Legends|Zaric sector]] from [[Korev VII]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Linis placed a 25,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty on the head of the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Cherioer]], who often assisted the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
